vulnerabilities.description: Potential information leakage by logging errors directly to the console, which may expose sensitive information.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement a logging framework that handles sensitive data securely and restricts error messages in production.

vulnerabilities.description: No validation on user input while fetching tasks, which may allow for injection attacks or unexpected behavior.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Implement proper input validation for task queries to prevent injection attacks.

vulnerabilities.description: Failure to handle promise rejections might lead to unhandled exceptions.
vulnerabilities.fix_suggestion: Use try/catch blocks or .catch() on promises to handle errors gracefully.
